hero.title2: Smart Transport.. Absolute Safety.. Logistics Leadership
hero.subtitle: Specializing in the land transport of goods, equipment, and materials, with leadership in bulk cement distribution using latest global techniques.

about.title: About ALFA TRANS
about.description: ALFA TRANS, CO.LTD is a pioneer in the land transport sector in Saudi Arabia, blending deep heritage with modern technology to deliver integrated logistics solutions supporting Vision 2030.

goals.title: Strategic Goals
goals.desc1: Adopting precise technical specifications for cargo safety.
goals.desc2: Developing human and technical capital for operational efficiency.
goals.desc3: Supporting supply chains in the Kingdom with international standards.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Specializing in specialized land transport of goods, equipment, and materials, while leading in the bulk cement sector, committed to highest standards of precision.

vision.title: Current Vision
vision.desc: Alfa relies on a technical specification system to determine the ideal transport method, ensuring proper conditions and access to the latest field developments globally.

safety.title: Goods Safety Procedures
safety.desc: We possess a scientific method for inspecting goods based on evaluation according to certified models to accurately determine shipment status.

why_choose_us.title: Why Alfa?
why_choose_us.subtitle: We don’t just transport goods; we build bridges of trust through integrated logistics solutions.

monitoring.title: Transport Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Real-time tracking through a specialized system monitoring the shipment from start to delivery, with continuous head office communication.

modern.title: Modern Techniques
modern.desc: Aspiring to be the first leader in using advanced technology in transport inside and outside the Kingdom according to international specifications.

list.title: Specialized Land Transport
list.desc: Safe transport of goods, materials, machines, and commercial shipments.

list.title: Bulk Cement Distribution
list.desc: Specialized stations and tankers for highly efficient transport, sale, and distribution of bulk cement.

list.title: Cargo Safety & Evaluation
list.desc: Scientific evaluation before and after transport to ensure system effectiveness and protection.

list.title: International Transport
list.desc: Cross-border transport connecting the Kingdom with neighboring countries according to global standards.

specialized_solutions.title: Specialized Bulk Cement & Heavy Transport Solutions
specialized_solutions.description: We operate integrated distribution stations ensuring supply chain stability for our partners in the construction and infrastructure sector of the Kingdom.
specialized_solutions.quality_desc: We adhere to the highest international safety standards in all our operations.
specialized_solutions.pro_desc: A trained and experienced team in supply chain management.

info.address: Riyadh 11433 - As Sulay, Harun Al Rashid St - P.O.Box 10484

form.name: Full Name
form.message_placeholder: How can we help you today?

list.q: How can I track my shipment?
list.a: We provide a real-time satellite tracking system that allows our clients to accurately follow the shipment route from takeoff to unloading.

list.q: What are your specialties in construction transport?
list.a: We lead in bulk cement distribution and heavy equipment transport, providing integrated logistics solutions for the construction sector.

list.q: Does your service cover international transport?
list.a: Yes, we offer cross-border land transport connecting the Kingdom with Gulf and neighboring countries according to the highest technical standards.

cta.about_desc: Discover how we became a leader in Saudi logistics, blending heritage with cutting-edge technology.
cta.services_desc: Explore our full range of specialized transport and logistics services tailored to your needs.
cta.careers_desc: Join a team that's shaping the future of logistics in the Kingdom. We're always looking for driven talent.
cta.contact_desc: Let's discuss how our logistics solutions can support your business goals.
